description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions CI workflow for the Botan project. The workflow should trigger on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. It should have read permissions for repository contents and cancel in-progress workflows when new commits are pushed, except on the master branch. The workflow should consist of multiple jobs for different operating systems (Windows, Linux, macOS) and special build targets, each with its own matrix strategy for building and testing Botan with various compilers, architectures, and configurations.
